---
title: CHAOSS Weekly Newsletter
author:
  - CHAOSS Community
type: post
date: 2019-06-05T17:05:01+00:00
excerpt: With respect to Grimoire Lab, version 0.2.22 was launched last week. This release is the first one that officially includes Graal, a generic repository analyzer. This is the first step to make the platform handle the data produced by this tool.
url: /chaoss-community-weekly-newsletter-june-5th-2019/
